full_text:
Huai Xu 懷叙
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Huai Xu (懷叙). He humiliated Lü Yi but was reprimanded by Gu Yong. Huai Xu was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
